headline: Man's 'I'm A Laughing Person' Is Actually Just Him Saying 'LOL' Out Loud After Everything He Says
summary: 'LOL, I'm going to the store,' Jake said. 'LOL, can you pass the salt?' The silence is deafening.
fullBody: Jake McVocalLOL says 'LOL' out loud after his own statements. 'I'm funny, LOL,' Jake said. No one laughed. 'It's my brand, LOL,' Jake explained. His friends have started a support group. 'He says LOL after serious things,' one friend said. 'His grandma died, LOL,' Jake said. He has been asked to leave the group chat. 'LOL, I understand,' Jake said. He did not understand.
